title: Leaping Shadows

sections.label: Verse
lines: The Lord's my shepherd by my side
In green meadows I will glide
He leads me down by waters calm
Restores my soul with gentle palm

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Yea though I walk through shadowed vale
With no fear I will not fail
For you are with me rod and staff
In your embrace I find my path

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Surely goodness love unfurls
Runs like rivers through my world
In your house I find my home
In your arms I'm not alone

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tables set before my foes
In your grace my spirit grows
Bountiful my cup o'erflows
Blessings rain down like a rose

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: In fields of gold where sunlight splay
I'll walk with you both night and day
Forever in your loving care
In joy and peace beyond compare

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Surely goodness love unfurls
Runs like rivers through my world
In your house I find my home
In your arms I'm not alone

epigraph: though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death
